import pandas as pd


def process_partitions(df, groups):
    results = []
    for group in groups:
        subset = df[df["group"] == group].copy()
        subset["score"] = subset["value"] * 2
        subset["rank"] = subset["score"].rank(ascending=False)
        results.append(subset)
    return pd.concat(results)


def clean_records(df, categories):
    cleaned = []
    for cat in categories:
        batch = df[df["category"] == cat].copy()
        batch["name"] = batch["name"].str.strip()
        batch["email"] = batch["email"].str.lower()
        cleaned.append(batch)
    return pd.concat(cleaned)
